name: PT Mulia Boga Raya Tbk
summary: PT Mulia Boga Raya Tbk manufactures and sells cheese and mayonnaise for salad dressing under the Prochiz brand name in Indonesia. The company offers block and sliced cheese, and other products. It sells its products through its own marketing force and third-party distributors. The company also exports its products. PT Mulia Boga Raya Tbk was founded in 2006 and is based in Bekasi, Indonesia. As of October 14, 2020, PT Mulia Boga Raya Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Garudafood Putra Putri Jaya Tbk.
